description: Use this API to purge an individual branch or two-winding transformer flow constraint record from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_brflw_brn(eibus, ejbus, cktid, bflwid)

parameters.name: eibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ejbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: bflwid
parameters.description: Branch flow constraint identifier. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
